title: Buttery Fluffy Middle-Eastern Chickpea Falafel
description: Indulgent and fluffy, this Middle-Eastern falafel dish is perfect for a meal or snack. The addition of garlic granules and buttermilk takes this classic chickpea recipe to the next level.
instructions: In a large bowl, mash the chickpeas using a fork or a potato masher until they are mostly smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, garlic granules, salt, and black pepper.
Add the dry ingredients to the chickpea mixture and stir until just combined.
Add the buttermilk and mix until the mixture comes together in a sticky dough.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 2-3 minutes until it is smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk, about 1 inch thick.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat until melted.
Add 4-5 falafel to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Transfer the cooked falafel to a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, until heated through.
Serve the falafel hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
Serve with your favorite dipping sauce, such as tahini or hummus.
